channel.title: Divisor on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Divisor on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #0: Common Formulae — Legendre's Formula & Divisor Convolutions
item.description: Legendre’s formula, divisor and multiple convolutions in O(n log n), offline-difference batch processing for H(n)=Σf(d)g(⌊n/d⌋).
